description: Legal document, identified internally as a "gift deed" in line 28. Dated: 1 Tammuz 5509 AM = 17 June 1749 CE. Location: Cairo. David ben Naʿim settles the estate (particularly the terms of the ketubba) of the woman Ashkenaz, wife of David ben Naʿim, following her death and reserves funds from her ketubba as a gift for their son Mordekhay when he reaches twenty years of age. The original value of the ketubba was 300 zeri maḥbūb. Signed by David ben Naʿim, and witnessed by Avraham Noaḥ and one unidentified witness. The communal rabbi Nissim Shelomo Algazi (b.1670-d.1761 CE) has also signed below the document acknowledging its validity. (MCD with Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
